description_long: This is a large, double-edged sword with a long, straight blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is dark in color and appears to be made of metal, featuring subtle vertical grooves running along its length for structural reinforcement and visual detail. The crossguard is straight and metallic, providing hand protection and balance, while the handle is elongated, cylindrical, and capped with a rounded pommel for secure grip and counterweight. The handle appears to be made of a darker material, possibly wrapped or textured for improved handling. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, suggesting a focus on function over decoration.
description: A large, double-edged straight sword with a dark blade, metallic crossguard, and a long, cylindrical handle capped with a rounded pommel. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and the cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard visible as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: long, cylindrical, dark-colored, capped with a rounded pommel, possibly wrapped or textured
